sentence: Ya mirá yo con el bata na casa.
ipa: ja miɾa jo kon el bata na kasa
gloss_en: I saw the child at home.
notes: Perfective particle 'ya' + final-stressed root 'mirá'; TMA syntax per forman1972; seseo throughout per lipski1987.

sentence: Ta comprá ele pan na tienda.
ipa: ta kompɾa ele pan na tienda
gloss_en: He is buying bread at the store.
notes: Imperfective 'ta' + 'comprá'; pronoun 'ele'; verb-initial creole syntax per forman1972.
Negation with 'no'; existential 'hay'; ⟨h⟩ realised [h] per lipski1987.

gloss_en: It is raining in the city.
What do you want to eat?

sentence: Ya cayé el niño na agua.
ipa: ja kaje el niɲo na aɡa
gloss_en: The child fell in the water.

sentence: El gente ta reza na iglesia.
ipa: el xente ta ɾesa na iɡlesia
notes: ⟨g⟩ before front vowel = [x]~[h] 'gente' and seseo ⟨z⟩=[s] 'reza' per lipski1987.

sentence: Ta trabajá su padre na campo.
ipa: ta tɾabaha su padɾe na kampo
gloss_en: His father works in the field.

notes: Negation 'no'; oblique marker 'con' on the object per forman1972.

sentence: Ta jugá el maga bata na calle.
ipa: ta huɡa el maɡa bata na kaje
gloss_en: The children are playing in the street.
notes: Plural marker 'maga'; yeísmo ⟨ll⟩=[j] 'calle' per lipski1987; substrate pluraliser per lipski2001.

sentence: Grande el vaca de mi tata.
ipa: ɡɾande el baka de mi tata

sentence: Ta canta el pájaro na árbol.
ipa: ta kanta el pahaɾo na aɾbol
gloss_en: The bird sings in the tree.
notes: ⟨j⟩=[h] 'pájaro'; acute-accent vowels mapped to base quality per forman1972.

sentence: Ya dá ele con mí el regalo.
ipa: ja da ele kon mi el ɾeɡalo
notes: Oblique 'con mí'; ditransitive frame per forman1972.
Substrate negator 'hende' and inclusive 'kita' per lipski2001; yeísmo ⟨ll⟩=[j] 'allá' per lipski1987.
